resources.string: Your PSN credentials expired. Sign in again to continue.
Please sign in with the same PSN profile linked to this console.
Register PXPlay with a new console
Rumble, sticks, and USB controller features
Change the audio output mode of this TV
Optional features that may change over time
Reset streaming and rendering settings in this section only.
Reset advanced settings in this section only.
Reset gamepad settings in this section only.
Reset audio settings in this section only.
Reset experimental settings in this section only.
Display the large \"Link New Console\" card on the home screen.
Display recently played game artwork on console cards. When turned off, PXPlay shows the default card image instead.
Show subtle vertical lines in the app background.
Choose how registered consoles are displayed on the home screen.
Choose what happens when you press Remote Play, or keep the default behavior to choose each time.
Show a separate wake-up button on the registered console card
Remember last-used console on TV home
On Android TV, focus the console you last connected to from TV when opening the home screen.
Could not register PXPlay with the %1$s! The reason for the error was %2$s\n\nPlease try again, if this error persists, restart your %1$s.
A connection to your %1$s could not be established! The reason for the error was %2$s. %3$s
A connection to your %1$s could not be established! %2$s

If you want to play over the internet be sure you have configured your router correctly and that your port forwarding settings are still valid. You can find all information here:

https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index#line5
No suitable decoder available on your device for %1$s. The built in codec on your device for %2$s is probably too slow to render the stream in real time.
Could not start video stream decoder %1$s. Something went wrong. Please try again, the built in codec on your device for %1$s could not be initialized.
An error occurred while decoding the video stream. Please restart the stream. If this error is occurring several times feel free to send a bug report. The exception was:\n\n%1$s.
An error occurred while streaming. Please restart the stream. If this error is occurring several times feel free to send a bug report. %1$s. The exception was:\n\n%2$s.

You can use your DualSense/ DualShock gamepad with Bluetooth or via USB-OTG.\n\nPlease note: use USB-OTG if possible. If you use a DualShock 4 gamepad connected via USB you have to disable \'USB audio routing\' on your device to enable audio. Connected Bluetooth gamepads may affect stream connectivity and speed on many Android devices.

You can use your DualSense/ DualShock gamepad with Bluetooth. Your Android device does not support USB-OTG.\n\nPlease note: Connected Bluetooth gamepads may affect stream connectivity and speed on many Android devices.
Finding or waking up the console was not successful! The reason for the error was %1$s. %2$s\n\nPlease try again, if this error persists, restart your console.
The PIN is usually a 4-digit number
Please enter a valid login PIN.
Tap the card for Remote Play and Local Play
Create a custom onscreen layout for:
Choose an onscreen layout to edit:
Start with a template layout you can edit.
Create a new layout to get started.
Do you really want to reset the settings to their standard values?
Reset settings to their standard values.
Select to automatically auto hide gamepad buttons.
Show virtual on-screen gamepad layout on touchscreen
Select to use volume keys as gamepad buttons.
The stream can be viewed (but not controlled) while the app is minimized.
Select to show trigger buttons (L3/ R3) on the standard onscreen gamepad layout.
Minimum latency suits most devices; larger buffers can reduce crackling on slower or unstable hardware.
Play left-channel audio on the right speaker and right-channel audio on the left speaker.
Another user is already using RemotePlay. If you recently disconnected from the %1$s, please wait a few seconds and try again later.
The RemotePlay process on the %1$s crashed
Registration failed, please check your PIN.
Console not found, please try again.
Be sure you are connected to the same network as your %1$s. If this repeats, enter your %1$s IP in \"Advanced Settings\".

Be sure you are connected to the same network as your %1$s. If this repeats, enter your %1$s IP in "Advanced Settings".

Would you like to try again with following PSN credentials:
PSN-Online-ID:
%2$s
PSN-Account-ID:
%3$s
Error, no stored PS5/ PS4 information. Please register PXPlay with your PS5/ PS4.
Please provide the 8 digit registration number
PXPlay is no longer working with the %1$s firmware installed on your %1$s.
A game or app is currently running on your %1$s which prevents remote play. Please close all running applications on your %1$s.
Could not connect to the %1$s, credentials are incorrect. Are you sure you have selected the correct %1$s profile in the PXPlay app?
Please wait a few seconds and try again later. If the error persists, please restart PXPlay.
There was a problem to obtain your PSN profile information

Could not request PSN-Profile info. Access denied.

Please restart PXPlay and try again.

If it is still not working please feel free to contact me.
Scan to download the log file
Use a phone on the same Wi‑Fi network as this TV.
Could not find a local network address. Connect this device to Wi‑Fi and try again.
Could not start the temporary download server. Please try again.
Could not create the QR code. You can type the address below in your phone\'s browser instead.
I accept the Privacy Policy\nand I understand that I need\na console to use PXPlay.
PXPlay needs an internet connection when you start the app. Please click OK, connect to the internet and try again.
If you enjoy PXPlay, would you mind taking a moment to rate it? It won\'t take more than a minute. Thanks for your support!
Please rotate your device to landscape mode to use gamepad mode.
Enables touch optimization to decrease erroneous inputs.
Select if the X-Axis should be processed.
Select if the Y-Axis should be processed.
Select if the joystick should slowly return to center
Select if the X-Axis should be processed.
Select if the Y-Axis should be processed.
Threshold value to reduce noise data.
Low Pass filter to remove sensor data outliers.\nHigher value means more noisy but more accurate.
Select if the analog stick should automatically return to the centralised position.
Improves the analog stick accuracy but can increase bandwidth.
Dead zone for the main (left) stick on your connected controller. Increase it if that stick drifts when you are not touching it.
Dead zone for the second (right) stick on your connected controller. Increase it if that stick drifts when you are not touching it.
Activate to enable eight digital pad directions.
Enables toggle touch mode for buttons.
Configure toggle behavior for specific button groups when global toggle mode is disabled.
Please check your %s registration address. Hint: please enter an address without a port, \"http://\" or \"https://\" prefix.

To automatically configure your home network for internet play, you must be connected to the same Wi-Fi network as your console, and the console must be turned on.

PXPlay will try to connect to your router and set everything up automatically.

This may fail on some routers due to security restrictions. If that happens, you will receive further instructions.
PXPlay can try to automatically configure your router for internet play.
Use the same Wi-Fi network as your console.
Your console must be turned on.
Many routers block automatic setup, manual port forwarding may be required.
You can wake the console first so it is ready to connect, or connect immediately if it is already on.
WiFi is currently not enabled.\n\nIn order to automatically configure your router for playing over the internet your PS5/ PS4 must be on the same network than your device.

Please be sure UPnP is enabled on your router. If UPnP is not enabled you will not be able to automatically configure your router for playing over the internet. On some routers UPnP could be buggy and not working properly, if you have problems to automatically configure your router you must configure it manually to be able to play over the internet if you do not want to enable automatic remote connection in the streaming settings.\n\nYou can find more information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6

An unknown error occurred. Be sure you are connected to same WiFi network than your console. Automatically configuring your router for playing over the internet is not allowed on all networks.

Error type: %1$s
Error code: %2$s
Error description: %3$s

The console was not found. Please be sure that your device is connected to the same network as your console and that your console is turned on.\n\nWould you like to enter the IP-Address of your console manually?
Multiple router devices found.\nPlease select one:

Successfully configured your router for playing over the internet.

You may have to repeat this process whenever the IP of your console has been changed.

In case of any connection problems you have to check the port forwarding settings on your router manually. You can find all information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line5
Could not automatically configure router. Error: 0x16

Failed to automatically configure your router for playing over the internet.\n\nYour router does not allow an automatic configuration. You must set up port forwarding manually. You can find all information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6

Your router did not allow to create all rules for playing over the internet. You can play remotely but you will not be able to wake up your PS4 while you are not at home.\n\nYou have to set up port forwarding manually on your router for port 987 UDP protocol. You can find all information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6

Your router returned a different public IP-Address than expected. This could be an indication that your internet provider does not give your router a real public IP-Address, or that you have a double NAT configuration (your router is behind another router which creates two different networks) or that you are using a hybrid router with two different network technologies like DSL and LTE.\n\nThe latter should not be a problem, however if you have a double NAT configuration at home or if your internet provider does not provide your router a real public IPv4, playing over the internet will probably not be possible for you. You can find further information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6
Your router has no IPv4-Address. Warning: 0x07

It seems your router has no IPv4-Address. If your internet provider does not give your router a real public IPv4-Address you can not connect to your console while you are away. Please check manually on the configuration interface of your router if this is the case. If your router only has an IPv6-Address you could contact your provider and ask if they could provide you a public IPv4-Address.\n\nYou can find further information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6

The configuration failed because of an unknown error. Your router may not fully support UPnP which is required to automatically set up port forwarding. You must configure your router manually.\n\nYou can find all information here https://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line6
Please wait while your router is being configured!
PXPlay will not work with the newest firmware version.\n\nIf you are using the latest %s firmware version, please be patient until a new update of PXPlay will be released.
Connect a supported controller to configure button mappings. This screen updates when a controller is connected.
Press and hold a button a few seconds, or press two buttons together.
Press a D-pad direction, or hold a button as for a standard mapping.
Move the joystick in the direction shown on screen.
Press two buttons for this touchpad shortcut.
You have unsaved controller mapping changes. Do you want to discard them?
This will remove the saved mapping for the currently selected controller.
A new version of PXPlay is available!
You already have the latest version of PXPlay installed.

Defines the number of pixels you can move your finger on the onscreen touchpad until a movement gesture will be recognized. If clicking on the onscreen touchpad is often not recognized on your device you should increase the threshold.

Attention: it is not recommended to enable this setting. This should only be used if you have problems with your hardware decoder on your device. Using a software decoder is usually a lot slower than using a hardware decoder. This could lead to artifacts in the stream, lags and maybe even to crashes on some devices.

You are using a software decoder that can negatively impact streaming performance and quality. You can deactivate the use of a software decoder in the \"Remote\" settings of PXPlay. The recommended streaming settings for software decoders are a maximum resolution of 540p and 30 FPS.
Please install a Browser on your device!

Use a conservative decoder setup to reduce freezes on some devices. Applies only to H.264 and has no effect with HEVC. Turns off internal PXPlay tweaks for better compatibility. If freezing continues, try changing the \"Decoder Performance Mode\" or enable \"Bitstream parsing\". As a last fallback, enable the \"Software Decoder\".
The log file content of PXPlay was copied to your clipboard as no application was found to share the log file. You could paste it manually in another program to share it.

Having trouble signing in to PSN or seeing errors like \"Connection to the server could not be established\"? If sign-in doesn\'t work, you can find alternative methods here:\n\nhttps://streamingdv.github.io/pxplay/index.html#line8
The transparency of the onscreen gamepad overlay. The lower the number, the less visible.
Show the microphone button on the onscreen gamepad layout

If activated the video stream will be displayed under the display notch and will use the full screen size if either video stream format \"Zoomed\" or \"Stretched\" is activated. If your device does not have a display notch this setting does not have any effect.
Which firmware is installed on your PS4?
Put the console in rest mode
Stop streaming by double-clicking the back button on your device or on your remote control.
Select the console you want to register

Tells Android to enable WiFi performance mode in order to achieve best streaming results. Could lead to Bluetooth delay problems on some devices. Deactivate WiFi performance mode only if you encounter Bluetooth delay problems.

Always request a keyframe from the console when a video frame is lost in transit. Might help reduce artifacts, but could introduce lag and stuttering on unstable networks.\n\nPlease note: This setting can drastically increase the bandwidth requirement.
If you have a modern device you can try to enable the HEVC decoder which is optimized for PS5 streaming. If you have problems with the HEVC decoder don\'t enable it.
Enable HDR for PS5 streaming. If you experience lags or other problems on your device while streaming don\'t enable HDR.
Enables DualShock/ DualSense motion sensor emulation with the available device sensors.
Hint: your device does not have the necessary hardware to emulate the motion sensor events of a DualShock / DualSense controller.
Enables DualShock vibration sensor emulation with the available device vibration motors.
Not supported by your device\'s hardware
USB Gamepad could not be connected!

There is currently an official Bug on Android 11 introduced by Google which makes using gamepads impossible on the whole system. Not all Android 11 users are affected, but it seems that this has something to do with some enabled accessibility services on your device. Disabling them sometimes fixes the error. Please note that this is not PXPlay\'s fault. You can find the official Google bug report with some suggestions on how to fix this bug on your device here:\n\nhttps://issuetracker.google.com/issues/163120692?pli=1

If the native gamepad mode is enabled, additional functions of your gamepad can be used on Android. Features like rumble, or gyroscope and Touchpad of your DualSense/ DualShock controller can be used if your gamepad is connected via USB. Native USB gamepad mode is currently supported for following gamepads: DualSense, DualShock, Thrustmaster eswap Pro
Choose your controller’s light bar color (if supported). Please note: The color will update after you connect PXPlay to your PS5 / PS4.
Show Light Bar colors from console
Would you like to select this created layout as the default layout?
The fixed bitrate value.\nCurrent value: %s\nWARNING: It is highly recommended to set the bitrate value to \"Auto\". Otherwise, the overall streaming experience may suffer.
How do you want to connect remotely?
Your PSN credentials have expired. Please log in again to establish a remote connection.
The PSN credentials you entered do not match your currently selected console.
Multiple consoles found. Which console do you want to connect to:
No consoles found. Ensure your console is online and connected to PSN. Try refreshing your PSN login via the Profile settings.
The remote connection is taking longer than usual. It is recommended to stop the connection process and try again. If you receive this warning several times please restart your console.
Your console could not be reached via the internet. It seems that the network you are currently connected with is not allowing a connection to your console. Please connect to a different network.
Your console has NAT Type 3. A remote connection may not be possible.

Activate the automatic remote connection feature. This feature is currently experimental, and it may not work in all network environments. Once activated you can connect remotely without configuring your router. Please note: PSN credentials are needed and your console must have the newest firmware installed.
Step 1: Sign in in the browser
Tap the button and sign in on the login webpage, then stop at the white redirect page and copy the URL from the address bar.

On the opened PSN login page, sign in with the same account you use on your console and want to use with PXPlay for Remote Play. After a successful login in the external browser, you will see a white redirect page. Stop there and get ready to copy the URL from the address bar in the next step.
After a successful login, paste the URL from the white redirect page in your browser (opened in the previous step) into the field below.
PSN sign-in page. D-pad moves the pointer; press Select to click.
Open the PSN login page using the button below.
Sign in with the account you use for Remote Play.
On the white redirect page, use the address shown in the bar as your redirect URL and copy it.
Paste the URL from the white redirect page after a successful login to the text field below.
Clipboard does not contain a valid web address.
When this setting is enabled, all supported gamepads connected via native USB gamepad mode or connected to an Android 12+ device will rumble.
If activated, a lot is logged in the background. This should NOT be activated for regular use.
When enabled, left and right analog stick are positioned using touch coordinates. Please note: This is only supported in landscape mode.
Show a button to change screen ratio during a remote play session
Limit the stream to half the screen height. In landscape, this only applies when enough vertical space is available. Useful for foldable or dual-screen devices.\n\n%1$s
Display the full on-screen controller layout in portrait mode. When disabled, only essential controls remain visible.
Show streaming stats as an overlay (resolution, bitrate, RTT, packet loss, decode time)
Video layout: fit to screen (keep aspect ratio)
Video layout: zoom / crop to fill
Would you like to enjoy XBox Remote Play with 1080p support, XBox 360 gaming support, customizable onscreen gamepad layout and other cool benefits?
PXPlay Now on Windows Linux & Mac!
Experience PXPlay on your Windows, Linux or Mac PC! Unlock new gaming possibilities on your PC or Handheld device. Get your license and elevate your gameplay!
Remote Play is disabled on your console.
Unable to query your Account-ID. The service might be temporarily unavailable. Please use the standard PSN-Login method to register your console.

Some games send gyro reset requests to enhance gyro aiming precision. This feature is disabled by default, as it may interfere with gyro input in certain games. Enable it if you want to allow gyro reset functionality for improved aiming in supported titles.
Current content can\'t be streamed. Press the PS button to go back to Home Screen
Reduce the display refresh rate when using Balanced frame pacing. May save battery but can increase video latency.
Uses AMD FSR 1.0 to upscale up to 2K/4K with sharpening when supported. Recommended only for powerful devices, may increase battery use.
Adjusts sharpening strength for FSR 1.0. Slide right for stronger sharpening; left for none.

Analyzes incoming video frames to repair missing references during network hiccups, reducing stutter, visual glitches, and freezes. Uses a little more CPU, turn off if playback worsens or your network is already very stable.
An error occurred during upscaling. Please restart the stream. If this happens repeatedly, please disable upscaling in the settings.

Your network may not support remote registration. Try registering locally on your %1$s.

Would you like to try again with the following PSN credentials:
PSN-Online-ID:
%2$s
PSN-Account-ID:
%3$s
Do you want to cancel the remote registration?
Enter a valid PSN Account ID (numbers only).
On PS4: Settings -> Remote Play Connection Settings -> Add device
On PS5: Settings -> System -> Remote Play -> Link device
Enter your console\'s IP address, or leave it unchanged to detect it automatically on your network.
Make sure your PSN privacy settings allow others to find you by search.
Enter your PSN Account ID number.
Make sure your console is up to date, connected to PSN, and on or in Rest Mode. It may not work in all network environments.
Are you sure you want to delete this registered console from this device?
Enable this if you want to use PXPlay only as a controller for your console without video or audio. This works only for local connections.
Automatically connect to this console when PXPlay starts.
Choose how PXPlay should connect to this console on startup.
%1$s\n\nChoose how PXPlay should connect to this console on startup.
Enable separate settings for local and remote streaming.
Enable override global settings to configure local and remote streaming for this console.
Custom local and remote stream settings enabled
Sign in with PSN or register a console to create a profile here.
This removes the profile from this device. Registered consoles tied only to this profile will be removed as well.
The profile will stay on this device as an offline account. Automatic Remote connection will no longer work for it until you sign in to PSN again and restore the link.
Quick Remote Play and Local Play for one console.
PXPlay\nNo configuration data, finish Widget setup.
No registered consoles. Open PXPlay and register a console first.
